worker_tasks.task_scope: Compare strength of feature dependencies between benign and attack classes within evidence refs e13 to e22 to identify class-conditioned dependency variations.
stop_conditions: dependency strength metrics computed for both classes
class-conditioned dependency differences identified or ruled out

worker_tasks.task_scope: Assess whether observed feature dependencies originate from inherent protocol behavior or from feature engineering artifacts using evidence refs e13 to e22.
stop_conditions: dependencies classified by origin (protocol vs engineered)
structural patterns linked to dependency sources identified

worker_tasks.task_scope: Evaluate stability and consistency of strong feature dependencies over time and varying network conditions within evidence refs e13 to e22.
stop_conditions: dependency stability metrics over time and conditions computed
